title: Food Menu
subtitle: Items here power the Food tab in the guest menu.

manage.title: Menu Items
manage.subtitle: Manage food and beverage items available for guests to order.
manage.suggestAllTitle: Offline suggestion — fills a Hindi name for items that don't have one yet. Review, then Save.
manage.empty: No items yet. Click "+ Add item" to create your first dish.
manage.savedOk: Food menu saved. Changes are live in the guest menu.
